name: Services
summary: The Services collector lists services installed on managed devices.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A description of the service's functionality.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A short name that uniquely identifies the service.

fields.name: startuptype
fields.description: The start-up mode. Boot — specifies a device driver started by the operating system loader. System — specifies a device driver started by the operating system. Automatic — specifies a service that starts automatically at system start-up. Manual — specifies a service started by the service control manager. Disabled — specifies a service that can no longer be started.

fields.name: status
fields.description: The current status of the service.

fields.name: user
fields.description: The user that owns the service's process.

examples.title: Example: Show services that are currently running and are set to start manually by users.
examples.v2_query: Services where Services status equals "Running" and Services startuptype equals "Manually"

examples.title: Which have services startup: manual
examples.v2_query:
Services startuptype, name, user, status
    WHERE Services startuptype equals "Manual"

examples.title: Which have services startup: automatic
examples.v2_query:
Services startuptype, name, user, status
    WHERE Services startuptype equals "Automatic"

examples.title: Which services are running
examples.v2_query:
Services startuptype, name, user, status
    WHERE Services status equals "Running"

examples.title: Which services are not running
examples.v2_query:
Services startuptype, name, user, status
    WHERE Services status equals "Stopped"

examples.title: Which services running as non-system identities
examples.v2_query:
Services startuptype, name, user, status
    WHERE Services status equals "Running"
        AND Services user not equals "LocalService"
        AND Services user not equals "LocalSystem"
        AND Services user not contains "NT AUTHORITY\"
        AND Services user not contains "NT Service\"
